## beehiiv engagements list

Get publication engagements <Badge intent="info" minimal outlined>OAuth Scope: publications:read</Badge>

### Synopsis

Get publication engagements <Badge intent="info" minimal outlined>OAuth Scope: publications:read</Badge>

Retrieve email engagement metrics for a specific publication over a defined date range and granularity. By default, the endpoint returns metrics for the past day, aggregated daily. The max number of days allowed is 31. All dates and times are in UTC.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/engagements

```
beehiiv engagements list [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --all                 Fetch every page and aggregate the results
  -h, --help                help for list
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```

      --timeout string          Override the request timeout, e.g. 45s
